what: Inter-iteration feedback through DB (feedback.md), not stage interface changes
why: 迭代反馈（Kaggle 跑分→调优）通过 research/{id}/feedback.md 传递，Execute 重跑时读取。符合 decision-006（阶段间仅通过 DB 通信），不需要改 stage 接口或新增通信机制。
reason: Feedback is now through evaluations/eval_v*.json and plan amendments, not a standalone feedback.md
